instruction: 请将以下自然语言问题转化为 Neo4j Cypher 查询语句。
input: 谁是论文《Text-Free Multi-domain Graph Pre-training: Toward Graph Foundation Models》的所有作者？
output: MATCH (p:Paper {title: 'Text-Free Multi-domain Graph Pre-training: Toward Graph Foundation Models'})-[:AUTHORED_BY]->(a:Author) RETURN a.name

instruction: 请将以下自然语言问题转化为 Neo4j Cypher 查询语句。
input: 在论文《Text-Free Multi-domain Graph Pre-training: Toward Graph Foundation Models》中提出了什么模型？
output: MATCH (m:Model)-[:PROPOSED_BY]->(p:Paper {title: 'Text-Free Multi-domain Graph Pre-training: Toward Graph Foundation Models'}) RETURN m.name
